2606.22327.title: Geometry-Aware Online Scheduling for LLM Serving: From Theoretical Bound to System Practice
2606.22327.paper_summary: The explosive demand for interactive Large Language Model serving has highlighted the management of the Key-Value cache's dynamic memory footprint as a critical area for performance optimization in inference engines. Modern inference systems overwhelmingly rely on time-centric scheduling heuristics, such as Shortest Job First. However, their theoretical optimality is rooted in traditional schedule modeling, failing to capture the highly dynamic, 2D spatio-temporal geometric growth specific to LLM inference mechanisms. To resolve this, we propose the geometry-aware online scheduling by introducing the Smallest Volume First (SVF) algorithm and its highly efficient variant, 1-bit SVF. Theoretically, we provide a rigorous mathematical foundation for our approach. Utilizing a novel proof methodology, we tighten the worst-case competitive ratio ($\text{CR} \le 48 \rightarrow \text{CR} \le 5$) for SVF with known output lengths. Building upon this core breakthrough, we complete a comprehensive theoretical taxonomy analyzing our algorithms across different traffic scenarios and information availability. Practically, we seamlessly integrate our approach as a plug-and-play layer in vLLM. Extensive evaluations on Llama-3.1 models demonstrate comprehensive performance gains: SVF delivers strong reductions in both average and tail latency, while 1-bit SVF, with merely a single bit information, achieves competitive throughput and latency. This work establishes a theoretically sound and empirically proven approach for resolving memory-constrained scheduling in modern LLM deployments. To facilitate future research, our code is available at https://github.com/Aurora-Kl/Geometry-Aware-Online-Scheduling.git.
2606.22327.paper_summary_zh: 互動大型語言模型服務的爆炸性需求突顯了關鍵值快取的動態記憶體占用管理作為推理引擎性能優化的重要領域。現代推理系統主要依賴以時間為中心的排程啟發式方法，如最短作業優先。然而，它們的理論最優性根植於傳統的排程建模，未能捕捉到特定於大型語言模型推理機制的高度動態、二維時空幾何增長。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了幾何感知的在線排程，通過引入最小體積優先（SVF）算法及其高效變體1位SVF。理論上，我們為我們的方法提供了嚴謹的數學基礎。利用一種新穎的證明方法，我們收緊了已知輸出長度的SVF的最壞情況競爭比率（$\text{CR} \le 48 \rightarrow \text{CR} \le 5$）。在這一核心突破的基礎上，我們完成了一個全面的理論分類，分析我們的算法在不同流量場景和信息可用性下的表現。實際上，我們將我們的方法無縫整合為vLLM中的即插即用層。對Llama-3.1模型的廣泛評估顯示出全面的性能提升：SVF在平均和尾延遲方面均實現了顯著的減少，而1位SVF僅用一位信息即可達到競爭性的吞吐量和延遲。這項工作建立了一種理論上合理且經實證證明的方法，以解決現代大型語言模型部署中的記憶體受限排程問題。為了促進未來的研究，我們的代碼可在https://github.com/Aurora-Kl/Geometry-Aware-Online-Scheduling.git上獲得。
2606.22327.author: Li Kong et.al.
2606.22327.authors: Li Kong, Qi Qi, Yinyu Ye, Zijie Zhou
